name: Terreno Realty Corp
summary: Terreno Realty Corporation acquires, owns, and operates industrial real estate in six major coastal U.S. markets: New York City/Northern New Jersey, Los Angeles, Miami, San Francisco Bay Area, Seattle, and Washington, D.C. The company invests in warehouse/distribution, flex (light industrial and R&D), transshipment, and improved land properties. As of December 31, 2025, Terreno owned 309 buildings aggregating approximately 19.8 million square feet and 46 improved land parcels, leased to 683 customers.
